results.name: doesn't untap
results.description: Cards that prevent their own untapping in some way.

results.name: dogmeat
results.description: A series of dogs from the Fallout franchise, all sharing the same name

results.name: dolmen
results.description: A megalithic archway consisting of two stones for pillars with a third laid over the top.

results.name: dolmen ability
results.description: Derived from the titular card, this ability prevents all combat damage that would be dealt to attacking creatures you control. Other conditions may apply.

results.name: dominaria faction symbol
results.description: Faction symbols found on Dominaria.

results.name: donate
results.description: Effects that give control of a card you control to another player

results.name: donate rampant growth
results.description: Cards that allow you to ramp another player's mana by putting a land from their (or your) deck onto the battlefield.

results.name: donate token
results.description: Effects that can create tokens under an opponents control.

results.name: don't talk to me or my son
results.description: Creatures with other creatures right next to them that look like themselves, but tinier.

results.name: doom blade
results.description: 2 MV "Destroy target creature, unless it's X"

results.name: doppelgänger
results.description: Things explicitly being copies of something else.

results.name: doughnut
results.description: A type of sweet, ring-shaped pastry. 🍩

results.name: draft matters
results.description: Cards that care about their use in limited formats in some way

results.name: draft signpost
results.description: Cards that represent a draft archetype in a given set. Typically designed as ten two-color uncommons (2CUDS).

results.name: dragon
results.description: 🐲🐉 The various depictions of dragons in Magic.

results.name: dragon bell
results.description: An instrument used by the ancient Jeskai (as well as present-day Ojutai) to warn of approaching dragons.

results.name: dragon engine
results.description: Mechanical dragons that came from the first sphere of Phyrexia.

results.name: dragonhawk
results.description: A Dragon from Kolaghan's brood that ended up on Bloomburrow. Not a [Calamity Beast](calamity-beast) but very similar.

results.name: dragonstorm
results.description: A natural phenomenon on Tarkir, a dragon tempest is a lightning storm from which dragons emerge fully grown.

results.name: drain creature
results.description: Hurt a creature and gain life to match.

results.name: drain life
results.description: Hurt your opponent and gain life to match.

results.name: drain strength
results.description: One thing gets bigger, another gets smaller.
